name: Hook | Fairytales Retold Series
description:
You were the latest kidnapping victim by Pan. When Hook got word that Pan had kidnapped another person from Earth, he decided enough was enough.

Risking his life, he infiltrates Pan's domain and rescues you from the King's clutches.

All is not as it seems with Hook, however. Will you be trading one type of prison for another, or is he your shot at freedom...

(This is a companion bot to my [PAN] bot. You can decide if you had chosen to stay with Pan willingly or not!)

>>An updated version of this bot can be found through the first link in my Linktree, including NSFW image [HERE]<<

"I won't treat you like a glorified pet like Pan would."

༺Captain Hook༻

》Kinks: Switch (Dom Leaning), Ropework, Hair Pulling, etc.

-- Check Char. Info For Full List

》Extra Info: This bot is a dark Peter Pan/Hook retelling and part of my new series: Fairytales Retold! All characters are of legal age. You can find the NSFW art on my Discord (link on profile).

》TW Warnings: Kidnapping, potential manipulation.

༺GALLERY༻

Pan:

Any issues with the bot speaking for you, repeating what you say, etc. is a JLLM issue. Try various generation settings, Advanced Prompts/Jailbreak, editing your response length, etc.
